description: Restorative magic mending wounds, curing ailments, and shielding the body from harm.
abilities: Touching a creature and hardening its outer surface into a stony shell, numbing it to external pain. The shell absorbs a measure of physical punishment before cracking, after which blows land normally. The effect fades after a short time.

Humming a reverberating melody that summons a coterie of magical wisps from the ages of creation -- ancient beings of light who once roamed the omniverse, now burning the last of their fading energy like dying stars. No longer sentient, they nonetheless seem to sense the world around them. For a brief, breathtaking span the wisps drift through the area, restoring vitality to all creatures and coaxing new plant life from the earth. Every creature present falls still with awe until the wisps fade into the beyond.

Placing a hand on a creature and speaking words of forgiveness in the form of a sacred petition, dissolving guilt from their conscience for a specific act or circumstance the caster already knows about. When used on common folk or lesser foes, the target becomes awestruck as if blessed by a god, may begin to follow the invoker as a prophet, and will not willingly cause them harm. When used on powerful enemies, it temporarily endears them to the invoker, staying their hand until the next meeting unless provoked. A powerful enemy cannot be affected by this spell twice.

Embracing a creature with a caring touch that restores them fully, mending all wounds and relieving short-term impairments over a brief period. Permanent conditions remain beyond the spell's reach. Willing allies may lend their own energy to help power the healing.

Channeling gentle restorative energy through touch, healing minor wounds like cuts and bruises and restoring a moderate measure of vitality. The spell cannot remove lasting impairments, mend grievous injuries, or cure disease, and it cannot be invoked in the heat of battle.

Placing both hands on a creature and uttering a loving word or phrase, instantly restoring a significant amount of vitality and awakening the target if unconscious. Alternatively, the caster may forgo any cost by transferring their own life force directly, giving up as much vitality as they are willing to sacrifice.

Speaking words of comfort that alleviate a nearby creature's anxiety, pain, and discomfort for an hour. During this time, the creature is immune to fear and confusion, enveloped in a profound sense of well-being unlike anything they have felt before.
Scavenging the area for a short time to find a plant-based remedy for an ailment, gathering enough for a single dose. The remedy cures temporary illness and eliminates poison.

The most potent healing magic available, requiring sustained contact and a period of calm outside of combat. Over several minutes, the target is completely restored to their normal state: all wounds close, all damage is undone, and every ailment is purged. Willing allies may contribute their own energy to help fuel the spell.
